rulings.Case Title: ESPERANZA LI VS. BRADEN MORE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs Incurred In Proving Genuineness Of Matters Plaintiff Denied In Her Responses To Mores Request For Admissions [Ccp. ? 2033.420]
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 10, 2016, line 1. DEFENDANT BRADEN MORE Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs Incurred In Proving Genuineness Of Matters Plaintiff Denied In Her Responses To Mores Request For Admissions [Ccp. ? 2033.420] transferred to department 514 to be heard by the honorable Joseph Quinn on April 4, 2016 at 1:30 p.m. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: NICHOLAS EDMUNDS et al VS. BETTY LEE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 10, 2016, line 2. PLAINTIFFS NICHOLAS EDMUNDS and SHELLEY ALINGAS' Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement DENIED, moot. Request for attorney's fees is DENIED. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: DEAN TURCHI VS. RAYMOND DAVIS TREW ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 10, 2016, line 3. PLAINTIFF DEAN TURCHI MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD GRANTED. Counsel prepare order. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: SUSAN MOLTHEN INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA AL-MASRI VS. TOPWELL INVESTMENT INC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Notion To Strike Portions Of First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 10, 2016, line 4. DEFENDANT TOPWELL INVESTMENT INC's Motion To Strike Portions Of First Amended Complaint GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is granted as to paragraph 44, line 10-11. Motion is otherwise denied. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges facts to support punitive damages and disgorgement of excessive rents. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: SUSAN MOLTHEN INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA AL-MASRI VS. TOPWELL INVESTMENT INC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 10, 2016, line 4. DEFENDANT TOPWELL INVESTMENT INC's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, plaintiff sufficiently alleges facts to support causes of action for fraud and for breach of covenant of good faith and fair dealing. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID BRYAN VS. SPECIALIZED LOAN SERVICING LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Stay Of Proceedings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 10, 2016, line 5. PLAINTIFF DAVID BRYAN's Motion For Stay Of Proceedings OFF CALENDAR, moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers and reply. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: SNEH REDDY VS. FRANCES SCHIESSL ET AL (Plaintiff 170.6 to Judge Quidachay)
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 10, 2016, line 9. PLAINTIFF SNEH REDDY's Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint GRANTED, First Amended Complaint shall be filed forthwith. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: PAULINE CHAN ET AL VS. PHILIP S. KWAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Immediate Sale Of Real Property
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 10, 2016, line 6. DEFENDANTS PHILIP KWAN, CAMERON HEASTON, LI HAU, DORIS YEE, PEARL JUE, ESTHER PENTICUFF and FRANCES ECKERT's Motion To Compel Immediate Sale Of Real Property GRANTED, unless Plaintiff matches exactly Buyer's offer and provides a written offer to that effect no later that 9:00 a.m. on March 10, 2016. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES KIMTZONG EU ET AL VS. GUISEPPE SPINOSA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 10, 2016, line 7. DEFENDANTS GUISEPPE SCOPPETTA and GIUSEPPE SPINOSO's Motion To Enforce Settlement DENIED. Moving party failed to establish that Plaintiff breached the settlement agreement. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: EAGLE VISTA EQUITIES, LLC VS. MARIO SORTO ET AL (dft 170.6 challenge Judge Robertson III)
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief Pursuant To Ccp 473
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 10, 2016, line 8. PLAINTIFF EAGLE VISTA EQUITIES, LLC's Motion For Relief Pursuant To Ccp 473 GRANTED. Mandatory relief under CCP 473(b) is granted. Order sustaining the demurrer to First Amended Complaint without leave to amend is set aside. Plaintiff to file and serve Second Amended Complaint no later than March 10, 2016. = (501/AJR)
